rationale: Educ. Code §28.0024 governs school-based savings programs and is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption. No overlap in subject matter, funding, or operation.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school may establish a school-based savings program to facilitate increased awareness of the importance of saving for higher education and facilitate personal financial literacy instruction.
_note: No conflict; rule addresses an unrelated subject area.
